title: mimulus ovatus
intro: Mimulus ovatus, also known as the monkey flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phrymaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Mimulus ovatus is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and can also be found in supplement form, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies.
